title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming mobile phone call during update
scenario: Device Firmware Update (DFU) continues and completes successfully when an incoming mobile phone call is received and answered during the update process
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile phone.
Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) and allow it to start downloading/installing.
While the DFU is in progress, receive an incoming mobile phone call on the same phone.
Answer the incoming call during the DFU process.
Keep the call active for a few seconds, then end the call.
Observe the DFU progress indicator in the Poly Studio Mobile app after the call ends.
expected: The Device Firmware Update (DFU) continues running or completes successfully without interruption. The update progress indicator shows normal progress, and the device remains connected/functional after the call ends.
